messages.content:
Hi,

Greeting for the day.

Just wanted to update u. We have formally launched our event management company ready to roll out on PAN INDIA basis. With our other international tie-ups in process we would shortly be ready to execute events in other countries as well. Since I am doing this with my existing JOB, hence promoting the company aggressively is a bit of a challenge.

Therefore we seek your blessings and help, to reach a wider network.

Please do "like" and "share" our "facebook" page and help us grow. Also let us know if we can cater to any of your events related requirements.

https://www.facebook.com/WellTimeEventsAndPromotions

Good LUCK. GOD BLESS.
